product_state.decision: Gate Zero direct competitor artifacts are pinned from verified PyPI downloads. Public comparison claims remain blocked until the harness executes the pinned adapters and records signed G1/G2/G3 result files.

rules.pinning: Benchmark owner pins exact versions + artifact hashes on the benchmark hosts before Gate Zero (plan row 0.8). Harness refuses to run gating jobs while any gate_zero entry has pinned=false.
rules.crashes: Competitor crashes/timeouts are recorded as data, never patched around (PRD 11.3).
rules.rerun: Reference competitors are re-measured after their major releases; published tables always state versions and dates.
rules.artifact_hash: artifact_sha256 must be the lowercase SHA256 of the exact package, binary, jar, wheel, or source archive executed by the benchmark harness. Repository commit hashes are not substitutes unless the source archive is the executed artifact.

pinning_requirements: Record exact version for each Gate Zero competitor.
Record runtime version when applicable, including JVM for OpenDataLoader PDF and Python for PyMuPDF4LLM.
Record artifact_sha256 for the exact artifact used by the runner.
Set pinned=true only after the artifact has been verified on the benchmark host.
Change status to FROZEN or FROZEN-SIGNED only when every gate_zero entry is pinned.

gate_zero.role: G1/G2 reference (2x throughput and 1/10 footprint comparisons; remeasured in-harness)
gate_zero.artifact_kind: PyPI universal wheel downloaded and SHA256-verified on the benchmark owner host
PyPI source distribution downloaded and SHA256-verified on the benchmark owner host

gate_zero.role: context (non-gating); closest Release-1 overlap, watch per risk R5
gate_zero.artifact_kind: PyPI source distribution downloaded and SHA256-verified on the benchmark owner host
PyPI universal wheel downloaded and SHA256-verified on the benchmark owner host
gate_zero.license_note: AGPL - run-only comparison, never a dependency (ADR-0004)
